calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-21-2025 Off Calendar

Motion And Notice Of Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-07-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Arash Moussavian, Esq. representing Plaintiff Fortune Dynamic Inc via Zoom Video Conference.
Barry Cheng, custodian of records for Plaintiff, sworn to testify.

Motion for default judgment against Defendant Dailyshoes, A California Corporation dba Daily shoes

Counsel provides an offer of proof as to the request for judgment.
Witness is examined by the court.
The court having reviewed moving documents and declarations and rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:

Plaintiff is to recover from Defendant:
Damages $58,231.60
Pre-Judgment Interest $5,823.16
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $705.00
Total Judgment $64,759.76

Proposed Judgment as amended is signed and filed by the court.

Dept:505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K.Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" commencing at 10:02:49 and concluding at 10:22:41 a.m.
